evals.prompt: Migrate this MatrixScan Cordova code from BarcodeBatch to BarcodeAr. Keep the visual feedback as a rectangle highlight on each tracked barcode (matching the existing Frame overlay style), and preserve the results map and 'done' / 'scan again' screen flow. File: MigrationSimpleSample.js
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, replaces all BarcodeBatch* symbols with BarcodeAr equivalents, replaces Scandit.DataCaptureView.forContext with new Scandit.BarcodeArView({...}), wires a BarcodeArRectangleHighlight provider, switches context.setMode to removing the separate addMode/setMode call entirely (BarcodeAr is bound via the view constructor), preserves the results map and camera lifecycle, and calls await barcodeArView.connectToElement(el).

assertions.text: BarcodeBatch is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchSettings is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlayStyle is NOT present in the output file
Scandit.DataCaptureView is NOT present in the output file
view.addOverlay( is NOT present in the output file
context.setMode( is NOT present in the output file
barcodeBatch.isEnabled is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeAr is present in the output file
BarcodeArSettings is present in the output file
BarcodeArView is present in the output file
BarcodeArRectangleHighlight is present in the output file
highlightProvider is present in the output file
connectToElement( is present in the output file
Scandit.BarcodeAr.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is present in the output file
camera.switchToDesiredState( is preserved in the output (camera lifecycle unchanged) (semantic)
The results map (window.results) and updateResults / done / scanAgain functions are preserved (semantic)
The highlightProvider.highlightForBarcode callback is async or returns a Promise (semantic)
detachFromElement is present or teardown releases the barcodeArView (semantic)

evals.prompt: Migrate this MatrixScan Bubbles Cordova code from BarcodeBatch + BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlay to BarcodeAr. The existing HTML bubble overlays (TrackedBarcodeView.withHTMLElement) must become BarcodeAr annotations. Also replace the manual quadrilateral-width distance heuristic with BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation. File: MigrationBubblesSample.js
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, replaces all BarcodeBatch* symbols with BarcodeAr equivalents, replaces Scandit.DataCaptureView.forContext with new Scandit.BarcodeArView({...}), wires a BarcodeArAnnotationProvider using BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation (with BarcodeArInfoAnnotation for close-up and far-away states), removes the manual Quadrilateral.prototype.width extension and viewQuadrilateralForFrameQuadrilateral calls, migrates freeze/unfreeze to use barcodeArView.stop()/start() instead of barcodeBatch.isEnabled, and calls await barcodeArView.detachFromElement() in teardown. The output explicitly does NOT use BarcodeArCustomAnnotation.

assertions.text: BarcodeBatch is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchSettings is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlay is NOT present in the output file
TrackedBarcodeView is NOT present in the output file
setViewForTrackedBarcode is NOT present in the output file
setAnchorForTrackedBarcode is NOT present in the output file
setOffsetForTrackedBarcode is NOT present in the output file
viewQuadrilateralForFrameQuadrilateral is NOT present in the output file
Quadrilateral.prototype.width is NOT present in the output file
PointWithUnit is NOT present in the output file
NumberWithUnit is NOT present in the output file
MeasureUnit is NOT present in the output file
barcodeBatch.isEnabled is NOT present in the output file
context.setMode( is NOT present in the output file
view.addOverlay( is NOT present in the output file
Scandit.DataCaptureView is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeArCustomAnnotation is NOT present in the output file — it is not available on Cordova (semantic)
BarcodeAr is present in the output file
BarcodeArView is present in the output file
annotationProvider is present in the output file
BarcodeArInfoAnnotation is present in the output file
BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation is present in the output file
connectToElement( is present in the output file
detachFromElement is present in the output file
The freeze/unfreeze functions use barcodeArView.stop() and barcodeArView.start() (or equivalent) instead of barcodeBatch.isEnabled (semantic)
The annotationProvider.annotationForBarcode callback is async or returns a Promise (semantic)
The close-up BarcodeArInfoAnnotation includes a header or body row with stock count text (semantic)
BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation.threshold is set to approximately 0.1 (matching the old screen.width * 0.1 heuristic) (semantic)
